title: notopleura sucrensis
intro: Notopleura sucrensis is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Notopleura sucrensis include the treatment of fever, malaria, and other infectious diseases, as well as its potential use in managing digestive issues and pain relief. Herbal preparations of Notopleura sucrensis are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be dried, crushed, and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
